Projects

What I've Built

Real-world projects combining hardware, AI, and software engineering.

🪞
Gen-Z Mirror

A smart IoT mirror powered by Raspberry Pi that offers real-time emotion detection, hairstyle suggestions, and environment monitoring — delivering a personalised, interactive user experience.

  • Implemented emotion detection & gender estimation using webcam input for personalized UX
  • Integrated IoT sensors (LDR, DHT11, buzzer, fan) for smart environment automation
  • Built hairstyle suggestion engine via facial analysis using computer vision
  • Designed automated lighting and alerting system for real-time interaction
Python Raspberry Pi OpenCV IoT AI/ML
🏦
Paperless Banking System

A robust console-based Java banking application supporting account creation, authentication, deposits, withdrawals, and balance inquiries — with a fully paperless, menu-driven interface.

  • Designed SQL schema for secure customer account data storage and operations
  • Applied OOP principles and Java Collections for efficient data management
  • Implemented user authentication and secure session-based banking flows
  • Delivered a clean, menu-driven interface for a paperless banking experience
Java SQL OOP JDBC Collections
🧠
ResearchOS AI

A premium agentic web intelligence platform that automates complex research workflows — crawling search indexes, performing fact cross-validation, and rendering interactive dashboards with dynamic report exports.

  • Engineered autonomous agent pipeline with dynamic status updates and multi-stage execution tracking
  • Integrated GSAP animations, interactive canvas particle engines, and cursor-glow micro-interactions
  • Designed fact cross-validation table to detect and alert on metrics discrepancies between references
  • Implemented responsive analytics visualizations using Chart.js and automated PDF compilation via html2pdf
JavaScript GSAP Chart.js AI Agents Web Scraping
